## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test --workspace=super-js`)
- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`npm run typecheck --workspace=@superjs/compiler-types`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Changeset added (`npx changeset add`) if `packages/` changed
- [ ] `compiler-types` semver bump category declared (if `packages/compiler-types/src/` changed — see `packages/compiler-types/SEMVER.md`)
